nasb.text: “Return to your house and describe what great things God has done for you.” So he went away, proclaiming throughout the whole city what great things Jesus had done for him.

esv.text: “Return to your home, and declare how much God has done for you.” And he went away, proclaiming throughout the whole city how much Jesus had done for him.

cnv.text: “你回家去，述說　神為你作了怎樣的事。”他就走遍全城，傳講耶穌為他作了怎樣的事。

ccb.text: “你回家吧，把上帝为你所行的奇事告诉别人。”他就回去，走遍全城，四处传扬耶稣为他所行的奇事。

csbs.text: “你回家去吧，述说神为你做了什么。”于是他就离开了，在全城里传扬耶稣为他做了什么样的事。
